//: Copy to model-editor.config.json (at the repo root, or in editor/) to reuse the editor in another LinkML model repo. All paths are relative to `root`. Omit any key to keep the NF default. Delete the // notes.
title: AD Knowledge Portal Model
subtitle: visual editor & ontology tools
//root: repo root holding the model source, relative to editor/'s parent (default '.' = editor sits at repo top; use '..' etc. for a submodule layout)
//sources: top-level YAMLs merged first + dirs globbed recursively for *.yaml
//headerFile: file that declares CURIE prefixes: (used by the QC prefix check)
//templateDir: dir whose classes are curation templates; null disables the dataType QC/requirement
//dataTypeEnums: enums whose permissible values are the valid `dataType` annotations; null disables the dataType feature entirely
//dcaConfig: Data Curator App registry to also update when creating a template; null disables DCA registration
//modelPaths: paths treated as model files for the Changes diff + Create-PR flow; omit to derive from sourceDirs + sourceFiles + dcaConfig
//build: one-click toolbar commands; {python} is replaced with .venv/bin/python if present, else python3
//domainHints: ontology-priority rules for the assisted term search (first regex match wins); omit for the built-in NF rules
